data.title: Construction Safety Week 2026 Promotes "Recognize, Respond, Respect" to Elevate Industry Health & Safety
data.description: On April 21, 2026, in Providence, Rhode Island, a new partnership was established between Construction Safety Week and OSHA. Construction Safety Week is an annual industry initiative focused on promoting health and safety within the construction sector. This year's event is scheduled for May 4-8 and will emphasize the theme "All in Together." This collaborative effort aims to enhance safety practices across construction sites and foster a culture of shared responsibility.

data.title: Why Is Merck Stock Falling Tuesday?
data.description: Merck & Co. Inc. and Eisai recently shared findings from the Phase 3 LITESPARK-012 trial focusing on advanced clear cell renal cell carcinoma (RCC), the most prevalent type of kidney cancer constituting about 75–80% of cases. The study assessed a triplet regimen combining Keytruda (pembrolizumab), Lenvima (lenvatinib), and Welireg (belzutifan), as well as MK-1308A, which pairs Keytruda and quavonlimab with Lenvima. These were compared to just Keytruda and Lenvima. However, during a predetermined interim analysis, the combination regimens failed to achieve the primary endpoints of progression-free survival (PFS) and overall survival (OS). The safety profiles of the combinations were in line with previous studies. Further analysis of the trial data is ongoing.

data.title: MGA launches multi-state workers' compensation feature to automate regional coverage for small businesses brokers
data.description: Starting April 21, 2026, EverPeak Insurance introduces a groundbreaking multi-state option to streamline the process for mobile workforces. This innovative feature enables brokers to effortlessly obtain workers' compensation coverage for employees in 17 states through a quick digital workflow that only takes 30 seconds. This initiative aims to eliminate the complexities and inefficiencies typically associated with navigating different jurisdictions, providing a simplified and efficient solution for brokers and their clients.

data.title: Eagle Mountain Data Now Offering High Density AI GPU Capacity at Fully Energized Anaheim Data Center
data.description: Eagle Mountain Data has revealed that its OC 1 data center in Anaheim, California is now open for pre-lease. The facility provides access to high-density AI-optimized GPU capacity through both bare metal and managed service options. Equipped with advanced NVIDIA GB300 systems and direct-to-chip liquid cooling technology, the OC 1 data center allows customers to efficiently deploy large-scale AI workloads. This eliminates the need to construct their own infrastructure, reducing delays, complexity, and capital investment.

data.title: Inc. Names Resecurity to Its 2026 List of the Fastest-Growing Private Companies in the Pacific
data.description: In Los Angeles, Resecurity has been ranked at No. 116 on the sixth annual Inc. Regionals: Pacific list, which showcases the fastest-growing privately held companies in the Pacific region encompassing California, Oregon, Washington, Hawaii, and Alaska. Resecurity, headquartered in Los Angeles, is an American company recognized by Inc., a prominent media brand and resource for entrepreneurs and business leaders.

data.title: Two Coachella Valley First Responders to Be Honored at Inaugural "Honoring Our Heroes" Golf Tournament Fundraiser
data.description: Every day, the brave first responders in the Coachella Valley dutifully respond to emergencies. This will be reciprocated on April 29 when the community rallies in support. In PALM DESERT, Calif., news broke on April 21, 2026 that on February 12, 2026, a courageous young sheriff's deputy intervened at a bridge overpass in the Coachella Valley and encountered an individual in distress.
